title: astracantha cretica subsp. rumelica
intro: Astracantha cretica subsp. rumelica, also known as Astragalus rumelicus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is a type of milkvetch. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astracantha cretica subsp. rumelica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of fatigue, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Astracantha cretica subsp. rumelica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies, such as capsules and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
